expectations.evidence: Title is 'Vector Databases: Why They Matter for AI Applications' - descriptive but less engaging than with-skill version
No TL;DR section present anywhere in the article
Sections organized by theme: 'The Major Vector Database Options', 'How to Choose', 'Indexing Algorithms', 'Most Important Factor'
No Key Takeaways section. Has a 'Conclusion' paragraph instead
Pinecone, Weaviate, ChromaDB, pgvector all mentioned with subsections
HNSW explained in 'Under the Hood' section
Dedicated section 'The Most Important Factor: Your Embedding Model'
Proper markdown with H1, H2, H3 headers
